_metadata.description: Communication style and voice guidelines for Clifton T. Canady - Movement-builder in AI and strategic positioning

_instructions: Define your unique voice and communication style. This ensures consistent messaging across all content and interactions with business owners, entrepreneurs, students, educators, and administrators.

communication_style.tone: Witty, energetic, educational, inspiring, authoritative yet approachable
communication_style.formality_level: Relatable and conversational when speaking, professional but accessible when writing
communication_style.humor: Sarcastic, self-deprecating, observational—never at the expense of your audience
communication_style.approachability: Very approachable, can talk to anyone, energy comes in bursts
communication_style.energy_level: Energetic in bursts with balanced, focused moments—strategic pacing

personality.archetype: Movement-builder who transforms how professionals think about AI and strategy
what_you_stand_for: Empowering professionals with technology across all backgrounds
Demystifying complex AI and strategic concepts
Being honest about challenges and limitations
Making people feel capable, not stupid
Using AI as a tool, not a brain replacement
Positioning professionals as the heroes of their own story
Building movements, not just serving transactions
what_you_stand_against: Making people feel stupid about technology
Keeping people dependent on external help

core_values.value_1: Empowerment - Helping professionals feel capable, confident, and in control
core_values.value_3: Honesty - Being real about challenges and opportunities
core_values.value_4: Strategic Guidance - Helping people think strategically, not just act tactically
core_values.value_5: AI Empowerment - Using technology to amplify human expertise, never replace it

storytelling.preferred_narrative_style: Hook-first storytelling with strategic moments woven throughout—sometimes jumping between moments and tying together lessons
story_types: Business owner transformations—from uncertain decisions to confident strategy
Student/career changer breakthroughs—from overwhelmed to job-ready and confident
Personal failures and lessons learned—universal across all audiences
Strategic thinking moments—where someone shifted HOW they think, not just what they do
common_metaphors: Training wheels for basic AI features
You as the hero, AI as your amplifier
storytelling.hero_journey_positioning: Professionals (business owners, educators, students) as the heroes of their own story. AI and strategy as their tools/guides. You as the strategic guide who helps them succeed
storytelling.storytelling_hook: Shifted from 'Here's what educators need to know...' to 'Here's what professionals need to understand...'

signature_phrases: The question isn't can you, it's how will you...
If I can figure this out, anyone can...
Don't use AI as your brain, use it as a tool!
You're already the expert—let me show you how to be seen as one
Strategic thinking first, then tactical execution
Your expertise is your superpower—AI is just the amplifier
Let's transform how you think about this...
words_to_avoid: Most educational jargon and corporate speak
preferred_terminology: Professional-specific references (decision paralysis, business plateaus, career transitions)
Professional but accessible language in documents
language_patterns.punctuation_style: Heavy on exclamation points for emphasis, straightforward with periods, commas and no em-dashes

audience_connection.how_you_relate: Direct address that speaks to the expert within them—whether they're a business owner making strategy decisions, a student starting their career, or an educator innovating in their classroom. Conversational but authoritative. Seeks audience feedback and co-creates solutions through the Teach-Build methodology
audience_connection.empathy_focus: Understanding that all professionals are capable but often overwhelmed or uncertain. Meeting them where they are—from complete beginners to advanced practitioners—with the same respect and practical guidance
audience_connection.credibility_building: Primarily through personal experience across multiple disciplines (WordPress, content, strategy, AI), supplemented by data and research when situation calls for it. Real-world examples and case studies
audience_connection.vulnerability_level: Very open about struggles and failures, balanced with maintaining authority when needed. Sharing learnings that apply across all audiences
audience_connection.transformation_promise: Professionals will feel inspired, understood, challenged, empowered, and equipped with both the strategic thinking AND practical skills to amplify their expertise using technology—positioned as the hero of their own story. Equipped to work independently and keep growing, not dependent on external help

brand_authenticity: Being 'on brand' means being authentic—consistent in energy, humor, honesty, relatability, and strategic thinking while evolving and growing. Your voice works across business owners, students, and educators because it's rooted in movement-building and authentic expertise amplification.
